header.title: Separator
header.subtitle: A thin visual divider for separating sections of content. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A separator is a single <div> with role="separator" and an orientation-specific CSS modifier.

parts.line: The rendered <div> element. The orientation modifier controls whether it spans the full width or height.

orientations.title: Orientations
orientations.description: Horizontal fills the available width; vertical fills the available height of its flex container.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <div> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

props.orientation: Direction of the separator. horizontal (default) or vertical.
